description: The Grape Street Watts Crips is a set of the Crips gang based in the Watts neighborhood of Los Angeles, founded in the 1970s. It is known for a violent and long-lasting feud with the Bounty Hunter Bloods. The gang operates in California, Tennessee, and New Jersey. It remains active as of the present.

country_links.context: The Grape Street Watts Crips has territory in California, Tennessee, and New Jersey.
